item.description: Hi, I’m Aaron Wasserman! I’m a Security Engineer III at Praetorian helping leading organizations solve complex security problems. All opinions expressed are my own, not my employer’s. I graduated from Georgia Tech with a B.S. in Computer Engineering in 2021 and an M.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering in 2022. In my time at Georgia Tech, I thoroughly enjoyed my coursework in malware reverse engineering and analysis, cryptographic hardware for embedded systems, and
